resultList.dtldesc: Own a serene haven in the city with this stylish 3 BHK apartment on sale in Sumadhura Sushantham, Vidyaranyapura Road, Bangalore. Located in a high-end gated community, this apartment provides generous interiors, high-end amenities, and a tranquil atmosphere ideal for family living.::::::Property Specifications::::::Located on the 1st floor of a 16-storey building, this North-facing apartment provides a clever balance of space and functionality. The apartment is empty, allowing you to design and furnish it to your preference.::::::It has three well-ventilated bedrooms, one of which has an en-suite western-style bathroom. A second shared western-style bathroom provides quick access for relatives and visitors. There are two balconies in the house, one adjacent to the bedroom and the other with a serene view of a garden, ideal for your tea time in the morning or your evening relaxation.::::::The interiors are provided with vitrified tile flooring, and the building is Vaastu compliant, something that is also desirable for people who want balance and positive energy in their homes.::::::Facilities::::::Basic amenities are covered car parking, water 24x7, 100% power back-up, security personnel, CCTV cameras, and two elevators for convenience. Autorickshaws and buses are readily available for public transport. Yeshwantpur Railway Station is 7 km away, and the proposed metro station is only 1.5 km away. You can have the Kempegowda International Airport within 25 km from the site.::::::
